_comment: Self-hosted webfonts for the geometric preset, pulled on demand by `npm run preset geometric` — not committed. Each entry is downloaded from its pinned Google Fonts (gstatic) URL into src/fonts/ and verified against sha256, and the @font-face is generated from these fields. To pin a different font/subset/weight, grab the woff2 URL + hash from https://gwfh.mranftl.com (google-webfonts-helper).
